title: DiscoveryContract.v1
description: Pre-generation discovery contract for Horror$Place VM-constellation. Declares which spine documents, manifests, registries, and graph indices were loaded before any authoring plan is proposed.

contractVersion.description: Semantic version of the discovery-contract schema.

discoveryId.description: Opaque identifier for this discovery envelope.

sessionId.description: Authoring session identifier that this discovery applies to.

agent.description: Identity of the agent performing discovery.

spineRefs.description: Spine documents loaded and trusted at discovery time.

ref.description: Path, URI, or logical ID of the spine document.

hash.description: Content hash or version identifier for the spine document.

manifestRefs.description: Repo manifests consulted for routing and policy decisions.

ref.description: Path or URI for the manifest file.

hash.description: Content hash or version identifier for the manifest.

registryRefs.description: NDJSON registries and contract-card collections consulted.

kind.description: Registry kind, for example regions, events, personas, styles, seeds.

ref.description: Path or URI for the registry.

hash.description: Content hash or version identifier for the registry snapshot.

ref.description: Path or URI for the graph index.

hash.description: Content hash or version identifier for the graph index.

runtimeCapabilities.description: Capabilities available to the agent at discovery time for this session.

allowedObjectKinds.description: Object kinds that the routing spine and manifests allow for this session.

allowedTiers.description: Tiers that the agent is allowed to touch based on manifests and governance.

allowedRepos.description: Repositories that may host artifacts for this session.

maxFilesInBundle.description: Maximum files allowed in a single bundle as derived from manifests.

maxBundlesPerSession.description: Maximum bundles allowed in this session as derived from manifests.

requireDeadLedgerRef.description: If true, authoring contracts must provide a valid Dead-Ledger policy reference.

oneFilePerRequest.description: If true, routing manifests require strictly one artifact per request for this session.

validation.description: Local validation results for discovery, as computed by CHAT_DIRECTOR or Rust helpers.

schemaValid.description: True if this discovery envelope validated against discovery-contract.v1 schema.

spineResolved.description: True if all spineRefs were found on disk or configured paths.

manifestsResolved.description: True if all manifestRefs were found and parsed.

registriesResolved.description: True if all registryRefs were found and parsed.

graphResolved.description: True if all graphRefs were found and parsed.

errorCodes.description: Optional list of error codes when any resolution flag is false.

notes.description: Optional free-form notes for operators and auditors.
